headline: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
summary: Anthropic extends Claude's voice mode to its powerful Opus and Sonnet AI models. Previously limited to Haiku, this expands its capabilities. The voice mode is also integrating into apps like Gmail and Slack.

headline: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
summary: Patreon is laying off 20% of its workforce, impacting around 93 employees. CEO Jack Conte cites AI's transformative impact on the tech industry. He clarifies that AI isn't replacing humans directly, but changing work methods.

headline: Corsair’s PC case with a panoramic glass design is $70 off
summary: Get the Corsair Frame 4500X RS PC case for $119.99, a $70 discount. This versatile case features a unique panoramic glass design. It supports EATX motherboards and long GPUs.

headline: Tesla’s robotaxi promises are clashing with reality
summary: Elon Musk tried to paint a positive picture of Tesla's robotaxi program during an earnings call. Despite adding cities and miles, Musk's usual confidence seemed subdued. The program's reality appears to be clashing with previous promises.

headline: The Logitech G29 Racing Wheel and Driving Force Shifter Bundle Drops to the Lowest Price Ever
summary: The Logitech G29 Racing Wheel and Shifter Bundle is at an all-time low price. Enhance your Forza Horizon 6 or Gran Turismo 7 experience. Don't miss this deal for immersive racing.

headline: Save 50% Off Anker's Newly Released SOLIX S2000 2,048Wh 2,400W LiFePO4 Power Station
summary: Anker's new SOLIX S2000 LiFePO4 Power Station is now 50% off. It boasts 2,048Wh capacity and 2,400W output. Enjoy 96% efficiency and a 10ms UPS switchover.

headline: The $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair Drops to $350 at Wayfair After a Massive 80% Discount
summary: A luxurious power lift recliner and massage chair is now only $350. This Wayfair deal offers a massive 80% discount from its $1,800 original price. Enjoy ultimate comfort and relaxation for less.

headline: LEGO Announces Star Trek: U.S.S. Enterprise NCC-1701 Bridge Set, Now Up for Preorder
summary: LEGO unveils a new Star Trek: U.S.S. Enterprise NCC-1701 Bridge set. The highly anticipated set is now available for preorder. It's slated for release in September.

headline: Burnham pauses plan to release some prisoners early from September
summary: Prime Minister Burnham has halted the early release of certain prisoners. The plan, set for September, is now on hold. A full review will be conducted before any releases.

headline: Mum and daughter who died at beach were trying to save boy, 7
summary: A mother and daughter drowned attempting to save a 7-year-old boy. Shally Rahman and Samiha Rahman were pulled from the water. Emergency services confirmed the tragic incident.

headline: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
summary: Brent crude oil prices surged over 6% on Thursday. Prices reached $100, a level not seen since May. Escalating conflict in the Middle East is cited as the cause.

headline: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
summary: Former President Trump states Saudi Arabia must recognize Israel for a nuclear deal. The landmark agreement involves helping Saudis develop nuclear energy. This recognition is contingent on joining the Abraham Accords.
